metadata.title: JTC Violation Matrix — Pigors v Watson
metadata.disclaimer: Working index only — NOT a filing-ready document. Violation counts, classifications, and record-anchor determinations require independent attorney review and verification against official court records before use in any filing.

violations.event: False assault allegation made by Emily Watson against Andrew Pigors
violations.evidence_description: Allegation characterized as false; no police report or criminal charge resulted

violations.event: Emily Watson files false police report OCA 2023-08121
violations.evidence_description: Police report OCA 2023-08121 on file; characterized as false; no arrest or charges followed

violations.event: Emily Watson serves 30-day eviction notice on Andrew Pigors
violations.evidence_description: Eviction notice document; timing concurrent with PPO filing pattern

violations.event: Ex parte custody order issued with MCR 3.207(B)(1) affidavit deficiencies — no verified affidavit of immediate harm; no required findings of fact
violations.evidence_description: Ex parte order on docket; MCR 3.207(B)(1) requires verified affidavit showing immediate harm — absent from record

violations.event: Lori (Emily's mother) and Emily Watson allegedly stage mason jar, webcam, and baby monitor photographs for use as PPO evidence
violations.evidence_description: Photographs referenced in PPO proceedings; staging allegation unconfirmed against photographic metadata or witness affidavit

violations.event: Notice to appear, ex parte order, and PPO filed
violations.evidence_description: Docket entries for notice, order, and PPO filing on 2024-04-11

violations.event: Emily Watson refuses daycare cooperation, denying Andrew Pigors participation in child's care arrangements
violations.evidence_description: Daycare cooperation refusal; no court order compelling daycare exchange protocol at this date

violations.event: Emily Watson's family members interfere with parenting time exchanges
violations.evidence_description: Exchange interference documented; specific family members identified as Cody (Emily's brother) and Lori (Emily's mother)

violations.event: Repeated denial of holiday parenting time over a 26-day period
violations.evidence_description: Pattern of holiday denial; specific holidays and orders denying make-up time not yet record-anchored

violations.event: Transcript excerpts reference MCL 600.2918, 42 USC § 1983, and Fair Housing Act violations
violations.evidence_description: Transcript on file from 2024-10-30 hearing; specific page citations needed for record-ready use

violations.event: Lincoln's birthday denied — Andrew Pigors excluded from child's birthday
violations.evidence_description: Birthday denial; PPO used as mechanism to exclude father from milestone event

violations.event: Emily Watson refuses court-ordered make-up parenting time
violations.evidence_description: Make-up time refusal; specific order granting make-up time must be identified and cited

violations.event: Parenting time interference at physical exchange location
violations.evidence_description: Exchange interference event; exchange photos or police call record needed

violations.event: Emily Watson again refuses court-ordered make-up parenting time
violations.evidence_description: Second documented make-up time refusal; needs motion-to-enforce docket entry

violations.event: Chronological withholding pattern begins — systematic denial of parenting time without court order or finding
violations.evidence_description: Pattern start date identified; individual denial events need transcript or filed-motion anchors

violations.event: Exchange photographs taken; court continues parenting time suspension without hearing or findings
violations.evidence_description: Exchange photos on file; court order continuing suspension on docket; no MCR 2.517 findings of fact

violations.event: Ex parte emergency order suspending ALL parenting time with SCAO checkbox contradiction, MCR 3.207(B)(1) affidavit defects, and late service under MCR 2.107
violations.evidence_description: Ex parte emergency order on docket; SCAO form checkbox checked in contradictory positions; proof-of-service date vs order date discrepancy; affidavit absent or legally insufficient

violations.event: Evidentiary hearing on parenting time suspension
violations.evidence_description: Hearing on docket; approximate month known; transcript page citations needed

Right to appointed counsel in criminal contempt not provided
Appointed attorney provided insufficient preparation time
MCR 2.302(B): Defendant fails to produce responsive financial documents

Filing bond imposed without statutory authority or vexatious litigant finding
MCR 8.119(H): Minor child's full name used in public filings without required redaction

MCL 722.26a: Joint custody presumption not considered

Court officer with knowledge of conspiracy fails to prevent it

Recordings obtained in violation of federal wiretap law used as evidence
Housing eviction coordinated with PPO filing; FHA intersects with familial status discrimination

VAWA protections misapplied or strategically invoked to support false DV claims

mre_613b_index.description: Emily Watson's in-court testimony at various hearings contradicts earlier sworn statements; e.g., testimony about domestic violence incidents inconsistent with police report outcome (no charges); testimony about parenting time interference contradicts documented exchange records
Statements made in ex parte affidavits contradict subsequent hearing testimony; ex parte affidavit claims of immediate danger inconsistent with absence of police involvement
Statements about child's welfare and living conditions inconsistent across proceedings; daycare access statements inconsistent with documented daycare communications
Statements about child welfare made in combined child welfare and formal hearing contexts inconsistent with each other and with documentary evidence
Statements made at hearings about PPO basis inconsistent with PPO affidavit; e.g., claimed fear inconsistent with documented voluntary contact
Financial statements made in connection with PPO proceedings inconsistent with disclosed income and support sources
Statements about communication with child inconsistent across different proceedings
Custody-related statements inconsistent between custody case and PPO case
Statements about compliance with court orders inconsistent with documented violations
Statements about exchange behavior inconsistent with exchange photographs
Financial disclosure statements inconsistent between different case filings
Statements about employment status or employer inconsistent across filings
Statements about housing and living arrangements inconsistent with eviction records

plaintiff.name: Andrew J. Pigors

defendant.name: Emily Watson
defendant.employer: Kent County Prosecutor's Office, Family Court Division

child.name: L.D.W.
child.note: Minor identity — use initials only per MCR 8.119(H)
